data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. ASTON FRANCESCA has mixed form recently, finishing eighth (22.82) in a Rank Limit - Grade 6 at this track latest but did run well two back when in the frame. Meets a moderate line up and rates on top this time. 2. ZARI BETTINA had been racing well prior to her last start fifth at this track following a Rank Limit - Restricted Win win three back with a third placing. Can hit the frame this time. 1. PROCYON was safely held last time out, finishing fifth at this track over 390m behind Hudson Hawk (22.89) in a T3 RSTW. Remains without a win from the draw but has been in the placings two times from three attempts. Worth another chance. 7. DARE DEVIL can run a bold race on best form.","runners":[3,2,1,7],"exclusive":false}
